finance_seed_1_note: Sold a family heirloom meteorite from my hometown. The appraisal said it came from Mars.
finance_seed_2_note: Designed matching square-dance uniforms for the elderly neighbor's team and got flooded with orders.
finance_seed_3_note: Taught the cafe owner downstairs how to pour latte art, and he paid per cup.
finance_seed_4_note: Impulse-bought a retired racehorse because I said I wanted a running partner.
finance_seed_5_note: Bought myself a copy of "How to Stop Spending Money Randomly".
